case_title: CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA N.A. VS. KENNETH R SUTTON et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 15,INCLUSIVE
